name: Pineapple-Peach Frappe'
recipeIngredient: 1 Cup Low-Fat Yogurt, plain and unsweetened
2 Tablespoons Sugar Substitute (equal to 2 tablespoons sugar)
recipeInstructions:
1. Add pineapple, juice, and peaches to an electric blender or food processor. Blend until pureed.
2. Gradually add yogurt, milk, and sugar substitute to the mixture. Continue blending until smooth and thickened.
3. Pour into individual glasses and serve immediately.
Food Exchange Per-Serving: 1 FRUIT EXCHANGE + 1 MILK EXCHANGE
CAL: 133; CHO: 6 MG; CAR: 23 GM; PRO: 7 GM; FAT: 1 GM; SOD: 103 MG
